# Driver's license negative corpus
Order reference A1234567 (no license keyword)
Invoice B9876543 for product
Tracking number C1234567890 (too long)
Serial number D12345 (too short)
Product SKU E9876543 warehouse
Barcode F1234567890128 (too long)
Model number G12345678 device
Reference code H9876543 support
Asset ID I1234567 equipment
Configuration J12345678 server
Part number K9876543 component
Item code L1234567 catalog
Lot number M12345678 batch
Version N9876543 software
Build O1234567 release
Customer ID P12345678 account
Member number Q9876543 loyalty
Employee ID R1234567 personnel
Contract S12345678 agreement
Ticket T9876543 support
